description: Mercado Libre Agent Toolkit for the Vercel AI SDK 6.

tools.name: answer_question
tools.summary: Post an answer to a question.
tools.side_effects: writes a public answer visible on the listing
tools.description: Answer a Mercado Libre pre-sale question (responder una pregunta). USE THIS WHEN: the question is real (not spam) and the agent has drafted a response in the seller's voice. Max 2000 chars. Returns `{

tools.name: categorize_listing_and_plan_attributes
tools.summary: Predict the category for a free-text title and return the required attributes.

siteId.description: Defaults to the toolkit's configured site.

tools.description: Predict the Mercado Libre category for a listing (predecir categoría) AND fetch its required attributes. USE THIS BEFORE `create_item`: it returns the canonical category_id, the domain_id, and the lis

tools.name: classify_question_spam
tools.summary: Heuristic spam classifier — labels a question as spam, borderline, or ham.
tools.side_effects: none — pure local function, no MELI call
tools.description: Classify a pre-sale question as spam / borderline / ham (detectar spam en preguntas) using a transparent heuristic. USE THIS BEFORE answering at scale to avoid wasting response time on spam waves. Ret

tools.name: create_item
tools.side_effects: creates a real listing on MELI
preconditions: category_id must exist for the configured site
listing_type_id must be valid for the seller's reputation level
tools.description: Publish a new Mercado Libre listing (publicar un producto en Mercado Libre). USE THIS WHEN the seller has decided to publish. Requires title + category_id + price + currency_id + available_quantity +

tools.name: defend_claim
tools.summary: Defend a claim — uploads N evidences in parallel + optional message.
tools.side_effects: uploads evidences + posts a message visible to the buyer + MELI mediator
tools.description: Defend a Mercado Libre claim (defender un reclamo) via the 2-day-SLA flow: upload all evidences in one call (one-shot per spec) and optionally post a closing message. USE THIS WHEN: a claim needs resp

tools.name: get_item
tools.summary: Fetch a single listing by id.
tools.description: Fetch a Mercado Libre listing by id (consultar una publicación; e.g. `MLA1234567890`). USE THIS WHEN: you need the listing's title, price, status, attributes, or pictures. Public endpoint, no seller s

tools.name: get_order
tools.summary: Fetch a single order with full detail (items, payments, buyer billing).
tools.description: Fetch a Mercado Libre order by id (consultar una venta), including buyer, payments, shipping, items. USE THIS WHEN: investigating a specific order. Returns `{ ok: true, order }`.

tools.name: get_seller_reputation
tools.summary: Read the seller's reputation (thermometer + metrics + pre-evaluated alerts).
tools.description: Fetch the seller's Mercado Libre reputation (reputación del vendedor), thermometer color, claim/handling/cancel rates, transactions, status. USE THIS WHEN: dashboarding or before a big-volume action l

tools.name: list_my_items
tools.summary: List the configured seller's listings (active, paused, or closed).
tools.description: List the seller's own Mercado Libre listings (mis publicaciones de Mercado Libre). USE THIS WHEN: the agent needs to inventory the seller's catalog or filter by status. Pagination via `scroll_id` is a

tools.name: list_open_claims
tools.summary: List open claims/disputes/mediations for the seller, sorted by due_date ASC.
tools.description: List open Mercado Libre claims (listar reclamos abiertos) at the requested mediation stage. USE THIS WHEN: the agent is running a defense pass. Returns `{ ok: true, claims, total }`. Pair with `defend

tools.name: list_promotion_candidates
tools.summary: List items eligible for current MELI promotions (discount % suggested by MELI).
tools.description: List available Mercado Libre promotions (promociones disponibles) the seller has been invited to but hasn't opted into yet. USE THIS WHEN: the seller wants to find money-printing opportunities. Return

tools.name: list_recent_orders
tools.defaults: if no status, returns paid + confirmed; if no dateFrom, returns last 24h

tools.name: list_unanswered_questions
tools.summary: List questions on the seller's listings that haven't been answered.

tools.name: update_item_price_or_stock
tools.summary: Update price and/or available_quantity on an existing listing.
